global_analysis.title: The Last Horizon
global_analysis.core_story_intent: Show a lone traveler confronting grief and finding renewed purpose at the edge of the world.
global_analysis.narrative_summary: A solitary traveler reaches a cliff at sunset, reflects on what was lost, senses a turning point, and chooses to move forward.
global_analysis.narrative_structure: setup -> reflective pause -> emotional reveal -> inner turning point -> resolution
global_analysis.visual_world: windswept coastal cliffs at golden hour with dramatic sky and strong negative space
continuity_constraints: keep the same traveler silhouette across all scenes
preserve windy cliff atmosphere and reflective emotional state

beat_analysis.visible_action: walking toward the edge of the cliff
continuity_notes: sky should remain warm and dramatic

scene_generation_recommendation.reason: This beat establishes the visual world, subject identity and emotional baseline.

beat_analysis.visible_action: standing still and facing the horizon
beat_analysis.environment: ocean cliff with moving clouds and distant sea
continuity_notes: preserve negative space around the character
keep wind interaction in clothing subtle

scene_generation_recommendation.reason: This beat carries the strongest emotional image of the sequence.

beat_analysis.visible_action: slight posture shift as the traveler decides to move on
beat_analysis.environment: same cliff edge with soft light opening in the sky
continuity_notes: subtle emotional lift in lighting tone

scene_generation_recommendation.reason: This beat supports the emotional transition and provides a clear bridge to resolution.
